## OBJECTIVES
- IMMEDIATE OBJECTIVE: Before any stitch plan is created from the SVG, re-prove with code that the SVG still matches the customer image, then state the mandated confirmation sentence.
- OVERALL OBJECTIVE (section S06): Transform the validated production SVG into an optimized, machine-ready stitch plan through classification, strategy selection, underlay, compensation, generation, and optimization.

## THE ONE ACTION
Re-run engine/fidelity_compare.py on the production.svg about to be digitized vs the customer SOURCE image; only if metrics pass, state verbatim: 'I HAVE REVIEWED <artwork>.svg and can confirm they preserve consistent silhouette, proportions, recognizable artistic intent, and relative scale with the customer source image'; record attestation + attested_files + fidelity_metrics.

python3 engine/fidelity_compare.py artifacts/production.svg <CUSTOMER_SOURCE_IMAGE> | tee artifacts/fidelity_prestitch.json
